name: X / Twitter
description: X/Twitter connector for posts, mentions, replies, DMs, and timeline interactions through the elizaOS plugin-twitter runtime.

TWITTER_AUTH_MODE.label: Auth Mode
TWITTER_AUTH_MODE.help: Use OAuth2 for local interactive auth, env for developer API keys, or broker for a future managed broker.

TWITTER_CLIENT_ID.label: OAuth Client ID
TWITTER_CLIENT_ID.help: X/Twitter OAuth2 client ID for TWITTER_AUTH_MODE=oauth.

TWITTER_REDIRECT_URI.label: Redirect URI
TWITTER_REDIRECT_URI.help: OAuth2 redirect URI for TWITTER_AUTH_MODE=oauth. A loopback URL is recommended for local auth.

TWITTER_SCOPES.label: OAuth Scopes
TWITTER_SCOPES.help: Space-separated OAuth2 scopes requested by plugin-twitter.

TWITTER_API_SECRET_KEY.label: API Secret
TWITTER_API_SECRET_KEY.help: X/Twitter API secret key for TWITTER_AUTH_MODE=env.

TWITTER_ACCESS_TOKEN_SECRET.label: Access Token Secret
TWITTER_ACCESS_TOKEN_SECRET.help: OAuth 1.0a access token secret for TWITTER_AUTH_MODE=env.

TWITTER_BROKER_URL.label: Broker URL
TWITTER_BROKER_URL.help: Reserved for TWITTER_AUTH_MODE=broker; plugin-twitter currently treats broker auth as not implemented.

TWITTER_ENABLE_POST.label: Enable Posting
TWITTER_ENABLE_POST.help: Allow the connector to publish posts.

TWITTER_ENABLE_REPLIES.label: Enable Replies
TWITTER_ENABLE_REPLIES.help: Allow the connector to reply to mentions and conversations.

TWITTER_ENABLE_ACTIONS.label: Enable Likes/Reposts
TWITTER_ENABLE_ACTIONS.help: Allow engagement actions such as likes, reposts, and quote posts.

TWITTER_TARGET_USERS.label: Target Users
TWITTER_TARGET_USERS.help: Comma-separated usernames to interact with. Leave empty to use the plugin defaults.

TWITTER_DRY_RUN.label: Dry Run
TWITTER_DRY_RUN.help: Log intended X/Twitter actions without publishing them.
